response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, including work with geospatial data (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby), but his primary expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited direct experience in C++ or Rust, which are core requirements for this role. His background in routing/navigation systems is indirect, and his recent work focuses more on AI-agent infrastructure and frontend development. However, his demonstrated adaptability and problem-solving skills suggest potential for growth in the required domains.
strengths: Strong geospatial data experience with GISCollective (open-source platform)
Proven ability to build high-performance, low-latency systems (Dunnhumby)
Extensive expertise in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, distributed systems)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ or Rust, the primary technologies for this role
No clear evidence of work on routing data pipelines or navigation systems
Recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure and frontend development, which may not align with routing tiling requirements
